requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline and EAEU TR CU / EAC Certification
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线及EAEU TR CU / EAC认证
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線及EAEU TR CU / EAC認證

summary.en: Armenia is an EAEU member. In-scope EV charging equipment placed on the Armenian market must follow the applicable EAEU Technical Regulations and bear the EAC mark where required. The primary product gateways for EV chargers are expected to include TR CU 004/2011 for low-voltage equipment safety and TR CU 020/2011 for electromagnetic compatibility. In parallel, IEC 61851-1 is the international EVSE safety baseline for conductive charging systems, while IEC 61851-23 applies to DC EV supply equipment. SARM is Armenia's standards body and must be checked for national adoption or equivalent references for the relevant IEC editions.
summary.zh: 亚美尼亚是EAEU成员国。在亚美尼亚市场销售的范围内电动汽车充电设备，须遵循适用EAEU技术法规，并在要求时加贴EAC标志。电动汽车充电桩的主要产品门槛预计包括TR CU 004/2011低压设备安全和TR CU 020/2011电磁兼容。同时，IEC 61851-1是传导式充电系统的国际EVSE安全基线，IEC 61851-23适用于直流电动汽车供电设备。SARM是亚美尼亚标准机构，须核实相关IEC版本是否已被国家采纳或等效引用。
summary.zht: 亞美尼亞是EAEU成員國。在亞美尼亞市場銷售的範圍內電動汽車充電設備，須遵循適用EAEU技術法規，並在要求時加貼EAC標誌。電動汽車充電樁的主要產品門檻預計包括TR CU 004/2011低壓設備安全和TR CU 020/2011電磁相容。同時，IEC 61851-1是傳導式充電系統的國際EVSE安全基線，IEC 61851-23適用於直流電動汽車供電設備。SARM是亞美尼亞標準機構，須核實相關IEC版本是否已被國家採納或等效引用。

standards_or_laws: EAEU TR CU 004/2011 — On safety of low-voltage equipment
EAEU TR CU 020/2011 — Electromagnetic compatibility of technical products
IEC 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements
IEC 61851-23 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment
SARM — Armenia national standards adoption and metrology body

summary.en: China's comparable design baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 for EV conductive charging systems. It is useful engineering evidence, but it includes China-specific connector, signaling, and communication assumptions. Chinese GB/T reports, CCC marks where applicable, and China domestic supplier declarations are not accepted as substitutes for EAEU TR CU / EAC conformity or IEC 61851 evidence requested by an Armenian project.
summary.zh: 中国可比设计基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023电动汽车传导充电系统。该标准可作为工程证据，但包含中国特定接口、信号和通信假设。中国GB/T报告、适用时的CCC标志和中国国内供应商声明，不能替代EAEU TR CU / EAC合格评定或亚美尼亚项目要求的IEC 61851证据。
summary.zht: 中國可比設計基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023電動汽車傳導充電系統。該標準可作為工程證據，但包含中國特定接口、信號和通訊假設。中國GB/T報告、適用時的CCC標誌和中國國內供應商聲明，不能替代EAEU TR CU / EAC合格評定或亞美尼亞項目要求的IEC 61851證據。

gap.en: Exporters should prepare an EAEU TR CU scope assessment, EAC certification or declaration route from an EAEU-accredited body where in scope, IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC chargers, protective earthing and residual-current protection evidence, enclosure and thermal data, installation instructions, and Armenian or project-owner language and marking requirements. A GB/T 18487 report alone is not an Armenia-ready safety file.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备EAEU TR CU适用范围评估、范围内产品由EAEU认可机构办理的EAC认证或声明路径、IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、直流充电桩IEC 61851-23证据、保护接地和剩余电流保护证据、外壳和热设计数据、安装说明，以及亚美尼亚或项目业主语言和标识要求。单独的GB/T 18487报告并不是面向亚美尼亚的完整安全文件。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備EAEU TR CU適用範圍評估、範圍內產品由EAEU認可機構辦理的EAC認證或聲明路徑、IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、直流充電樁IEC 61851-23證據、保護接地和剩餘電流保護證據、外殼和熱設計數據、安裝說明，以及亞美尼亞或項目業主語言和標識要求。單獨的GB/T 18487報告並不是面向亞美尼亞的完整安全文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where EV charging equipment falls within EAEU TR CU 004/2011 or TR CU 020/2011 scope; IEC 61851 evidence is mandatory where required by SARM adoption, tender, site owner, utility, or project specification
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and is not accepted as a direct EAEU TR CU / IEC 61851 substitute

source.publisher: National Body of Standards and Metrology of Armenia (SARM)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Because Armenia is in the EAEU, EAC certification or declaration under TR CU 004/2011 and TR CU 020/2011 is a real gate for in-scope EV chargers. Build the Armenia file around EAEU scope, EAC evidence, and IEC 61851 safety documentation, not around China GB/T evidence alone.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 由于亚美尼亚属于EAEU，范围内电动汽车充电桩须依据TR CU 004/2011和TR CU 020/2011办理EAC认证或声明，这是真实门槛。亚美尼亚资料包应围绕EAEU范围、EAC证据和IEC 61851安全文件建立，而不能仅依赖中国GB/T证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 由於亞美尼亞屬於EAEU，範圍內電動汽車充電樁須依據TR CU 004/2011和TR CU 020/2011辦理EAC認證或聲明，這是真實門檻。亞美尼亞資料包應圍繞EAEU範圍、EAC證據和IEC 61851安全文件建立，而不能僅依賴中國GB/T證據。
